article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.1. FMC - External Review of City Financial Practices 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on hiring an external reviewer to assess Burnaby's financial practices
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on hiring an outside expert to review how the City manages its finances, sets spending priorities, and plans for future costs — with the goal of keeping tax increases manageable for businesses and residents.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the April 14, 2026 council decision — findings could influence future tax and service cost changes.

key_dates.label: Burnaby external financial review — council vote date
